flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Rockingham Community College fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3k → 1.1k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Rockingham Community College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 (55.7% → 68.3%).
